graph.cross_sheet_notes: Sheet 28 (=LA2 +SCU2), drawing 31971 'Sensor Control Unit 2 / Launch System'. Two fiber-optic opto-coupler modules -21/A13 (Occupied Upstream) and -21/A14 (Occupied Downstream), both 'ITL LWL K-01.2'. 24VDC/0V supply enters from sheet 20.8. Upstream fiber -W5497 (POF) arrives from +SCU2-BEL into A13 LWL IN; downstream fiber -W5469 leaves A14 LWL OUT to +SCU1-BEL. Digital I/O cross-references: A13 DIG OUT -> -X3.9 (15.7); A14 DIG IN <- -X4.6 (16.6). Several designations blurred — see unresolved.
